reference: Recently, I had right upper back pain two months ago. I went through physiotherapy and was normal, but two days ago my back started to hurt again. Additionally, I have something in my underarm that seems swollen, and my right breast doesn't seem to be normal.
text: Recently I had right upper back pain 2 months ago. I went through physiotherapy and was normal, but 2 days ago my back started to hurt again. Additionally, I have something in my underarm that seems swollen, and my right breast doesn't seem to be normal.
